sentence.chinese: 以前，稻米一年一穫，每當收割完，部落族人便開始籌劃豐年祭，那時候馬蘭的豐年祭都要一個月。凌晨破曉之際，部落總管階層會到卑南溪出海口海岸邊標示設帳處，作為將來海祭時設營帳地點的指標。以前會配合退潮日，而今，為了現代年輕人工作需求，配合休假縮短為七日來舉行馬蘭的豐年祭。
sentence.ab: Itiya ho, cecay mihecaan kinacecay mipanay, malaheci mipanay i, misatapang to mihalaka ko niyaro’ matayal to kiloma’an, cecay a folad ko kiloma’an no Farangaw itiya. Monihar pafo’is ko mihiningay no niyaro’, hasa kaitiraan no mikesi’ay a rarong. I ’ayaw i misa’osiay ho to kakerahan a romi’ad, anini to i, pakacaloway to kaemangay a matayal, itira sanay to kapahanhanan no koyomi, mansa, pitoay to a romi’ad ko kiloma’an no Farangaw.

sentence.chinese: 第一天為準備工作。凌晨天色未明時少年組就會開始呼喊部落婦女準備食物，長老會交付與叮囑任務給年齡階層。
sentence.ab: Sakacecay a romi’ad i, misahafay paca’edong ko tayal. To’eman ho milekal to ko pakarongay a pakafana’ to niyaro’ to pisahafay, paca’edong ko malitengay to sasamaanen ko demak.

sentence.chinese: 第二天為祭告祖靈，早上長老們聚集於集會所中一起食用早餐，青年階級及少年組則在集會所前的廣場起舞演唱。下午大約三點左右，所有年齡階層聚集在集會所廣場前，舉行敬告祭祖儀式。
sentence.ab: Sakatosa a romi’ad i, panemnem misatola’ ko tayal no niyaro’, maranam ko isefiay makero ko kapah ato pakarongay. Ikor no kalahokan to tolo ko tatokian i, masa’opo ko kapot i sefi misatola’ to.

sentence.chinese: 第三天是海祭。清晨，部落總管以下所有年齡階層的男子集合於廣場。清點人數後，眾人浩浩蕩蕩向海邊出發開始三天兩夜的海祭，最小年齡階層的要先在已標示好的設帳處搭好營帳。各年齡階層的帳篷是依長幼來排成一排的營帳，年齡階層各自在自已階層的營帳休息，以往海祭活動的期程長逹一個月，而現在呢，只有二個晚上。
sentence.ab: Sakatolo a romi’ad i, pafata’an mikesi’ to. Kanikaran i, misa’osiay to masakapotay a malingaday a tamdaw. Pafata’an ko masakapotay, malingad to a mikesi’, o sararemay a kapot no kapah ko sa’ayaway tahira i pafo’isan a mipatireng to rarong. Icowa ko rarong no kapot i, icowa a maro’, silsil sanay a masarayaray ko rarong no masakapotay i pikesi’an. Itiya ho masafoladay to ko pilafin no masakapotay i riyal a mikesi’, anini to i, tosaay to ko lafii.

sentence.chinese: 第四第五天，則是婦女們穿著傳統盛裝，帶著食物及飲料等前來營帳處慰勞自己的男性家屬，其意義在宣慰辛勞，提振士氣。
sentence.ab: Sakasepat sakalima a romi’ad i, mipawsa to ko fafahiyan no salawinawina tayra i rarong, i sefi, o pa’icel pahofi to fa’inayan no loma’.

sentence.chinese:
[---]
豐年祭的第五天也就是年齡階層海祭的第三天，午後三點各年齡階層整隊繞著帳篷跑步。之後拔營返回部落，快接近部落途中，部落少女們會迎接並協助穿著傳統服飾，各年齡階層依階層高低排列成縱隊，以踏跳步伐回到集會所，之後長老致詞鼓舞並獎勵年齡階層。晚上，在廣場依年齡階層順序牽手跳起團體舞。
sentence.ab: Sakalima a romi’ad no kiloma’an i, o sakatolo a romi’ad a mikesi’ no kapot i riyal, herek no lahok to tolo ko tatokian i, silsil sanay a masarayaray ko masakapotay mitaliyok i rarong a paciyaci’. Herek to i, misolimet to to lalosidan, minokay to i niyaro’, mangata to ko niyaro’ i fatad no lalan, palitemoh ko foraforayan no niyaro’ to caedong no ’Amis, parayray to ko kapah pasayra i sefi no niyaro’ a mitaliyok, ikor to, mikimad mipa’icel pakahofi to masakapotay ko isefiay. Dadaya to i, misatapang to a malikoda’ ko niyaro’, silsil sanay a masarayaray ko masakapotay a malikoda.

sentence.chinese: 第六天，早上各戶提供糯米糕到集會所，並殺豬分配豬肉及糯米糕送到各戶年齡階層家中。在差不多時間時，如果這一年中該年齡階層有人過世，該年齡階層的同伴會在這時候前往喪家慰問。這天晚上仍有跳團體舞的活動。
sentence.ab: Saka^nem a romi’ad i, mipahemay mitokad to diyong ko niyaro’, palilam to masakapotay. Mahalineknek to ko demak i, ano ira ko minokayay a kapot no kapot i, tayra i loma’ nira a micohong, mihinom to rarom no siloma’ay. Nga’ nga’ay to mikihatiya to ’alomanay i niyaro’, i dadaya i, malikoda to.

sentence.chinese: 第七天，各年齡階層整天參與各式各樣的比賽活動，所有競賽皆由長老評定名次，競賽的主要目的是各年齡階層取悅長者並爭取榮譽。也可以藉著這個活動，凝聚各年齡階層團結與部落之向心力。
sentence.ab: Sakapito a romi’ad i, mipipipay to ko tayal no masakapotay, adihayay ko masamaanay a nikalalifet no niyaro’ a masaromi’ad, o sapakahemek to malitengay, o isefiay ko misetek to kalalifet. Nga’ay pakayni toniya demak, marikec masolimet malacecay ko faloco’ no niyaro’ sanay ko tatodong.
